name: Rhubarb Compote
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds fresh rhubarb stalks, sliced to 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonreactive pan, simmer the rhubarb, orange juice, and honey together for 8 minutes until the rhubarb is tender when pierced with a fork.
2. Remove from heat and let cool until warm.
3. Serve in bowls topped with dollops of yogurt.
